Service.Name: WMS
Service.Title: GeoServer Web Map Service
Service.Abstract: A compliant implementation of WMS plus most of the SLD extension (dynamic styling). Can also generate PDF, SVG, KML, GeoRSS

Layer.Title: GeoServer Web Map Service
Layer.Abstract: A compliant implementation of WMS plus most of the SLD extension (dynamic styling). Can also generate PDF, SVG, KML, GeoRSS

Layer.Name: tasmania
Layer.Title: Tasmania
Layer.Abstract: Tasmania Australia from Digital Chart of the World.

Layer.Name: tiger-ny
Layer.Title: TIGER New York
Layer.Abstract: Topologically Integrated Geographic Encoding and Referencing (TIGER) dataset for New York.

Style.Name: polygon
Style.Title: Default Polygon
Style.Abstract: A sample style that draws a polygon

Style.Title: Default Polygon

Layer.Name: policegis:ap_district_boundary
Layer.Title: AP Police - District Boundary
Layer.Abstract:
This Layer provides for District boundary information and has coverage of full Andhra Pradesh State.
Source : 1:1 Mile Maps & 1:50,000 SOI Toposheets
Year of Generation : 1998
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: admin:ap_district_boundary
Layer.Title: AP Admin - District Boundary
Layer.Abstract:
Source : 1:1 Mile Maps & 1:50,000 SOI Toposheets
Year of Generation : 1998
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: policegis:ap_district_headquarter
Layer.Title: AP Police - District Headquarter
Layer.Abstract:
Source : 1:1 Mile Maps & 1:50,000 SOI Toposheets
Year of Generation : 1998
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: policegis:ap_district_road
Layer.Title: AP Police - District Road
Layer.Abstract:
Source : High resolution satellite imagery (Cartosat + LISS IV merged data) IRS P6 LISS IV Satellite data with spatial resolution of 5.8m and PAN images of 2.5m resolution were used for Digitization of road network in conjunction with Survey of India (SOI) Toposheets on 1:50,000 scale.
Year of Generation : 2008 - 2010
Scale : 50K

Style.Name: policegis:polce_District_roads
Style.Title: Default Styler for simple road segments
Style.Abstract: Light red line, 2px wide

Layer.Name: pmgsy:ap_habitation
Layer.Title: AP PMGSY - Habitations
Layer.Abstract: Source : AP_GOVT_FINAL XLS, Jnamabhumi, PRDepartment Year of Generation : 2014 Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: pmgsy:ap_mandal_boundary
Layer.Title: AP PMGSY - Mandal Boundary
Layer.Abstract:
Source : 1:1 Mile Maps & 1:50,000 SOI Toposheets
Year of Generation : 1998
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: admin:ap_mandal_boundary
Layer.Title: AP Admin - Mandal Boundary
Layer.Abstract:
Source : 1:1 Mile Maps & 1:50,000 SOI Toposheets
Year of Generation : 1998
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: policegis:ap_police_circle_boundary
Layer.Title: AP Police - Circle Boundary
Layer.Abstract:
Source : Police Department
Year of Generation : 2018
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: policegis:ap_police_division_boundary
Layer.Title: AP Police - Division Boundary
Layer.Abstract:
Source : Police Department
Year of Generation : 2018
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: policegis:ap_police_station_boundary
Layer.Title: AP Police - Station Boundary
Layer.Abstract:
Source : Police Department
Year of Generation : 2018
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: policegis:ap_police_station_point
Layer.Title: AP Police - Station Point
Layer.Abstract:
Source : Police Department
Year of Generation : 2018
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: policegis:ap_police_sub_division_boundary
Layer.Title: AP Police - Sub Division Boundary
Layer.Abstract:
Source : Police Department
Year of Generation : 2018
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: admin:ap_state_boundary
Layer.Title: AP Admin - State Boundary
Layer.Abstract: Source : 1:1 Mile Maps & 1:50,000 SOI Toposheets Year of Generation : 1998 Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: policegis:ap_village_boundary
Layer.Title: AP Admin - Vllage Boundary
Layer.Abstract:
Source : 1:1 Mile Maps & 1:50,000 SOI Toposheets
Year of Generation : 1998
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: admin:ap_village_boundary
Layer.Title: AP Admin - Village Boundary
Layer.Abstract: Source : 1:1 Mile Maps & 1:50,000 SOI Toposheets Year of Generation : 1998 Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: policegis:ap_village_point
Layer.Title: AP Police - Village Point
Layer.Abstract:
Source : 1:1 Mile Maps & 1:50,000 SOI Toposheets
Year of Generation : 1998
Scale : 50K

Style.Name: policegis:ap_village_point
Style.Title: Default Point
Style.Abstract: A sample style that draws a point

Layer.Name: aquaculture:aquaculture_cadastral
Layer.Title: AP AQUA - Aquaculture Cadastral
Layer.Abstract:
Source : SSLR (Survey Settlement and Land Records Department ), Digital Data
Year of Generation : 2010
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: aquaculture:aquaculture_district
Layer.Title: AP AQUA - Aquaculture District
Layer.Abstract:
Source : 1:1 Mile Maps & 1:50,000 SOI Toposheets
Year of Generation : 1998
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: aquaculture:aquaculture_mandal
Layer.Title: AP AQUA - Aquaculture Mandal
Layer.Abstract:
Source : 1:1 Mile Maps & 1:50,000 SOI Toposheets
Year of Generation : 1998
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: aquaculture:aquaculture_ponds
Layer.Title: AP AQUA - Aquaculture Ponds
Layer.Abstract:
Source : 1:1 Mile Maps & 1:50,000 SOI Toposheets
Year of Generation : 1998
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: aquaculture:aquaculture_ponds_cadastral
Layer.Title: AP AQUA - Ponds Cadastral
Layer.Abstract:
Source : SSLR (Survey Settlement and Land Records Department ), Digital Data
Year of Generation : 2010
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: aquaculture:aquaculture_village
Layer.Title: AP AQUA - Aquaculture Villages
Layer.Abstract:
Source : 1:1 Mile Maps & 1:50,000 SOI Toposheets
Year of Generation : 1998
Scale : 50K

Style.Name: polygon
Style.Title: Default Polygon
Style.Abstract: A sample style that draws a polygon

Style.Name: epris:assets_pointstacked
Style.Title: Stacked Point
Style.Abstract: Styles volcanoes using stacked points

Style.Name: point
Style.Title: Default Point
Style.Abstract: A sample style that draws a point

Layer.Name: pmgsy:core_network
Layer.Title: AP Transport - Core Network
Layer.Abstract:
Source : High resolution satellite imagery (Cartosat + LISS IV merged data) IRS P6 LISS IV Satellite data with spatial resolution of 5.8m and PAN images of 2.5m resolution were used for Digitization of road network in conjunction with Survey of India (SOI) Toposheets on 1:50,000 scale. With inputs from Panchayati Raj Department.
Year of Generation : 2018
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: aquaculture:creeks
Layer.Title: AP AQUA - Creeks
Layer.Abstract:
Source : 1:1 Mile Maps & 1:50,000 SOI Toposheets
Year of Generation : 1998
Scale : 50K

Style.Name: aquaculture:lake
Style.Title: Border-less gray fill
Style.Abstract: Light gray polygon fill without a border

Style.Name: line
Style.Title: Default Line
Style.Abstract: A sample style that draws a line

Style.Name: polygon
Style.Title: Default Polygon
Style.Abstract: A sample style that draws a polygon

Layer.Name: pmgsy:district_rural_road_plan
Layer.Title: AP Transport - District Rural Road Plan
Layer.Abstract:
Source : High resolution satellite imagery (Cartosat + LISS IV merged data) IRS P6 LISS IV Satellite data with spatial resolution of 5.8m and PAN images of 2.5m resolution were used for Digitization of road network in conjunction with Survey of India (SOI) Toposheets on 1:50,000 scale. With inputs from Panchayati Raj Department.
Year of Generation : 2018
Scale : 50K

Layer.Name: tiger:giant_polygon
Layer.Title: World rectangle
Layer.Abstract: A simple rectangular polygon covering most of the world, it's only used for the purpose of providing a background (WMS bgcolor could be used instead)

Style.Name: giant_polygon
Style.Title: Border-less gray fill
Style.Abstract: Light gray polygon fill without a border

Source : Senential Data

Layer.Name: policegis:national_state_highway
Layer.Title: AP Police - NH & SH
Layer.Abstract:
Source : High resolution satellite imagery (Cartosat + LISS IV merged data) IRS P6 LISS IV Satellite data with spatial resolution of 5.8m and PAN images of 2.5m resolution were used for Digitization of road network in conjunction with Survey of India (SOI) Toposheets on 1:50,000 scale.
Year of Generation : 2008 - 2010
Scale : 50K

Style.Name: policegis:polce_National_state_highway
Style.Title: Default Styler for simple road segments
Style.Abstract: Light red line, 2px wide

Layer.Name: sf:sfdem
Layer.Title: Spearfish elevation
Layer.Abstract:
Digital elevation model for the Spearfish region.
sfdem is a Tagged Image File Format with Geographic information

Style.Name: dem
Style.Title: Simple DEM style
Style.Abstract: Classic elevation color progression

Layer.Title: Tasmania cities
Layer.Abstract: Cities in Tasmania (actually, just the capital)

Layer.Abstract: Main Tasmania roads

Style.Name: green

Style.Abstract: A blue fill, solid black outline style
